name: Japanese Novel Book
comment: An optional ----fenced front-matter block (key: value metadata), then one relative .jpnov source path per line. Deliberately error-agnostic: backslashes, non-.jpnov paths, missing files, and unknown/duplicate metadata keys are the language server's diagnostics to report — the grammar must not second-guess them (any key: value line inside the fences is painted as metadata). The front-matter region anchors on a fence at the very start of the document (\A); a fence after leading blank lines still parses server-side, it just goes unpainted. There is no semantic-token layer for book files, so nothing can repaint over this.
